{{CargoRelic
|name=Special Mouse Trap
|class_id=20493
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A collectible of Hitman No.95 and a period piece. It's said that this mouse trap was a witness to the grudges between No.95 and No.96 but it also documented the memory of them making peace with each other before forming a precious brotherhood.
|fame=29
|art=16
|fth=13
|civ=17
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 3 Shrine Rat Zaps, Snail ATK +1<br>Rats Killed: 150/150
|ss2=Per 3 Shrine Rat Zaps, Snail ATK +2<br>Rats Killed: 150/150
|ss3=Per 3 Shrine Rat Zaps, Snail ATK +3<br>Rats Killed: 150/150
|ss4=Per 3 Shrine Rat Zaps, Snail ATK +3<br>Rats Killed: 150/150
|ss7=Per 3 Shrine Rat Zaps, Snail ATK +3<br>Rats Killed: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
